Full Analysis

Wingstop's 15 pc Mix & Match Meal for 2 is a high-protein option in the Wing Combos category. With 4060 total calories, this item provides a robust 120g of protein, fueling your day with bold flavors and clean nutrition data.

Whether you are counting macros for training or just craving that signature Wingstop seasoning, this item delivers $26.39 worth of premium quality. Check out the allergen markers below for dietary safety.
